name: Palmer 12x12 Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Shed with Classic Charm & Smart Backyard Functionality
open_features: The iconic barn roof design adds visual interest while providing increased headroom and overhead storage potential inside.
Straightforward framing, clean lines, and easy-to-follow plans make this shed ideal for both first-time builders and experienced DIYers.
Rustic barn-style double doors allow easy access for tools, lawn equipment, bikes, storage totes, and workshop materials.
Cool-toned siding, white trim accents, and a traditional barn silhouette create a timeless look that fits effortlessly into any backyard setting.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Palmer Shed Plan - a 12x12 compact barn-style storage and workspace solution designed for efficiency, charm, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring a traditional gambrel barn roof, clean horizontal siding, crisp white trim, and rustic barn-style double doors, the Palmer delivers classic character paired with modern, everyday usability. Whether you're building a garden storage shed, small workshop, hobby space, or an organized backyard utilit...
